english translation text: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

Praise be to Allah
Before everyone (praises Him).

Praise be to Allah
After everyone (praises Him).

Praise be to Allah
When everyone (praises Him)

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ يَبْقى رَبُّنا ويَفْنى كُلُّ وأحَد
english translation text:
Praise be to Allah
Everlasting Forever is our Lord and everyone passes away.

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ حمد يَفْضُلُ حمد الْحامدينَ حمد كَثيراً قَبْلَ كُلِّ اَحَد
english translation text:
Praise be to Allah
The glorification of the glorifiers exalts His glory. Immeasurably exalted is His glory, before everyone (exalts Him).

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ حمد يَفْضُلُ حمد الْحامدينَ حمد كَثيراً بَعْدَ كُلِّ اَحَد
english translation text:
Praise be to Allah
The glorification of the glorifiers exalts His glory, immeasurably exalted is His glory, after everyone (exalts Him).

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ حمد يَفْضُلُ حمد الْحامدينَ حمد كَثيراً مَعَ كُلِّ اَحَد
english translation text:
Praise be to Allah
The glorification of the glorifiers exalts His glory, immeasurably exalted is His glory, when everyone (exalts Him).

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ حمد يَفْضُلُ حمد الْحامدينَ حمد كَثيراً لِرَبِّنَا الْباقى وَيَفْنى كُلِّ اَحَد
english translation text:
Praise be to Allah
The glorification of the glorifiers exalts His glory; immeasurably exalted is the glory of our Everlasting Lord, Nourisher, and everyone passes away.

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ حمد لا يُحْصى وَلا يُدْرى وَلا يُنْسى وَلا يَبْلى وَلا يَفْنى وَلَيْسَ لَهُ مُنْتَهى
english translation text:
Praise be to Allah
Glory which is, Immeasurable, Unperceivable, Unforgettable, Imperishable, Indestructible, and there is no end to it

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ تَحميدا يَدوُمُ بِدَوامِهِ وَيَبْقى بِبَقآئِهِ فى سِنِى الْعالَمينَ وَشُهوُرِ الدُّهوُرِ وَاَيّامِ الدُّنْيا وَساعاتِ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهارِ
english translation text: Praise be to AllahEverlasting duration of His glory makes His glorification eternal, continuous existence of His glory keeps His glorification alive for ever, throughout the cosmic ages, months all through the centuries, days passing by in tHis world, and every moment of the nights and days.

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ اَبَدَ الاَْبَدِ وَمَعَ الاَْبَدِ مِمّا لا يُحْصيهِ الْعَدَدُ وَلا يُفْنيهِ الاَْمَدُ وَلا يَقْطَعُهُ الاَْبَدُ
english translation text:
Praise be to Allah
Never-ending glorification along with ever eternal glory, which neither can be counted in addition, nor can be terminated into an end, nor can ever be discontinued
be praised and hallowed in Allah, the Best Creator

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
